description: Hot comedians identified via comedy club secondary market scans

comedians.name: Mo Amer
comedians.social: Netflix specials (The Vagabond, Mohammed in Texas), Chappelle connection
comedians.pattern: Dallas $279 x5 shows = rabid local audience. Orpheum LA theater date at $40 = graduation underway

comedians.name: Amber Autry
comedians.social: 817K TikTok, 21.3M likes. Podcast: Im Fine Its Fine
comedians.pattern: TikTok-to-standup breakout (Matt Rife trajectory). $300 Charlotte, $158 Comedy Store, $171 Improv Ontario. Coastal premium, mid-market $60-80

comedians.name: Kountry Wayne
comedians.social: 3.5M+ social, Netflix special A Womans Prayer, Variety 10 Comics to Watch
comedians.pattern: DC premium ($105-116), Nashville/NJ at $61-63. Clean comedy + faith/fatherhood. 2 shows/night at clubs = selling out. Theater graduation imminent

comedians.name: Jay Jurden
comedians.pattern: SoCal is his market ($100-143). DC only $67 = regional, not national yet. Watch for theater announcement in LA

watchlist.name: Chris Porter
watchlist.note: 5 shows at Pittsburgh Improv at $89-99. Just below threshold. Watch for price increases
